sections.paragraph:
not used in Kal; Arab. شَجُحَ to be brave vigorous; شجْعُ vigorous, brave; also, fierce (used of camels), Kam. The primary idea appears to be that of any impetuous excitement.

Pual, part. מְשֻׁגָּע-

(1) one wrought on by a divine fury (Begeifterter); in a bad sense, a fanatic (Schwärmer), used of false prophets, Jer 29:26 Hos 9:7 also, in contempt used of true prophets, 2Ki 9:11.

(2) a madman, 1 Sa. 21:16 Deu 28:34.

Hithpael, to be mad, 1Sa 21:15, 16 1Sa 21:16. Hence-
